Constellation Technologies Limited ( (AU:CT1) ) has provided an update.

Constellation Technologies Limited has released its Corporate Governance Statement for 2025, emphasizing its adherence to the ASX Corporate Governance Principles and Recommendations. The company outlines its commitment to good governance by detailing the responsibilities of its Board, including oversight of the company’s operations, strategic goal setting, and risk management. This governance framework is designed to support the company’s growth and operational expansion, with a focus on transparency and accountability to shareholders.

data.title: EPX Limited Reports Revenue Growth Amid Increased Losses and Strategic Restructuring
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

EPX ( (AU:EPX) ) has shared an announcement.

EPX Limited reported a 17.2% increase in revenues for the year ending June 2025, reaching $15.27 million. However, the company also experienced an 18.7% increase in losses after tax, amounting to $5.75 million. The company did not declare any dividends for the period. Significant financial adjustments were made to the underlying EBITDA, which improved from a loss of $1.45 million to $643,389. This was achieved through strategic initiatives such as departmental restructuring and the acquisition of Coda Cloud technology. These efforts are part of EPX Limited’s broader strategy to enhance operational efficiency and align resources with strategic priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:EPX) stock is a Buy with a A$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EPX stock, see the AU:EPX Stock Forecast page.

More about EPX

EPX Limited, formerly known as EP&T Global Limited, operates in the technology sector, focusing on providing innovative solutions for operational efficiency and strategic alignment. The company is involved in implementing ERP systems and acquiring technology platforms like Coda Cloud to enhance its service offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 386,904

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Regal Asian Investments Implements Share Purchase for Dividend Reinvestment Plan
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from VGI Partners Asian Investments Ltd ( (AU:RG8) ).

Regal Asian Investments Limited has announced the purchase of shares on-market to satisfy its Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRP) for eligible shareholders. The DRP price will be the lesser of the average market price or the company’s net tangible assets per share, as recently announced. This move is expected to enhance shareholder value by providing a structured reinvestment option, potentially impacting the company’s market positioning positively.

More about VGI Partners Asian Investments Ltd

Regal Asian Investments Limited (ASX:RG8) offers investors a concentrated portfolio with long and short positions in securities focused on the Asian region. The company transitioned its portfolio management to Regal Funds Management in June 2022 and rebranded from VGI Partners Asian Investments Limited to reflect these changes. The investment strategy employs a fundamental, bottom-up approach leveraging Regal’s expertise and network.

data.title: Planet Based Foods Completes Debt Settlement to Enhance Financial Stability
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Planet Based Foods Global Inc ( (TSE:PBF) ) is now available.

Planet Based Foods Global Inc. has completed its debt settlement transactions with Baron Global Financial Canada Ltd. and Coenda Investments Holding Corp., issuing 15,238,094 subordinated voting shares to settle CAD $800,000 of debt. This move, involving related parties, was made to improve the company’s financial position and was executed at a 25% discount to the market price, reflecting the company’s serious financial difficulties and the necessity to enhance its financial stability.

Spark’s Take on TSE:PBF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:PBF is a Underperform.

The overall score reflects significant financial weaknesses, including consistent losses and financial instability, which are major concerns. Technical analysis provides some stability but does not significantly offset the poor financial performance. Valuation is low due to ongoing losses and lack of dividend yield, further impacting the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:PBF stock, click here.

More about Planet Based Foods Global Inc

Planet Based Foods Global Inc. is a company focused on reimagining the future of food through sustainable ingredients, plant-based solutions, and advancements in agricultural technology. The company aims to empower food manufacturers, partners, and consumers to participate in a cleaner, healthier, and more resilient global food system, with a strong emphasis on environmental stewardship and product excellence.
